name: Put the Sausage in the Bun
short_description: Guide a wobbly sausage into its bun using balloons and bees in this chaotic physics puzzle. Can you master the fine art of getting the sausage in just the right place?
detailed_description:
Put the Sausage in the Bun is a physics-based puzzle game where your goal is straightforward— get the sausage into the bun. Use balloons and bees to move the sausage through various obstacles, with realistic sausage'y physics making everything a greater challenge than it needs to be. As you progress, new levels introduce new challenges, requiring more precision, fast and creative thinking to complete.

Free Hot Hot Hot Expansion

We’ve just released our first free expansion pack that adds three new levels to the game. The challenge of assembling the greatest cullinary creation in history has never been more stressfu… I mean fun!

Use your skills to cook the greatest soup of all time, deliver the most important package, and show that a 16 kilogram kettlebell is nothing for your mighty bees.

Now with CrowdControl™ !

Put the Sausage in the Bun now has native support for CrowdControl™ which will make streaming all the more fun! Let your viewers interact, affect and help take your sausage handling and game experience to the next level.

There’s no such thing as too many cooks!

Can you master the fine art of getting the sausage in just the right place?
